title: Fix Locked Level Contrast & Visibility
description: Increase locked levels from opacity 0.3 to 0.5+ with lock icon overlay. Keep names readable.

changes.what: Update .level-btn.locked opacity from current 0.5 to ensure readability. Check lock icon already exists via ::after pseudo-element. Increase icon size.

notes: Current CSS already has opacity 0.5 and lock icon. May already satisfy requirement. Verify and enhance if needed.
